# **What is the solution?**

## Requirements overview (optional)

1. Fixing MFC funnel: On our MFC check limit landing page, all funnel events are not getting associated.
2. For fetch events: BE and FE are sync. When lender is changed then routing is wrong. 
3. Populate x-appPlatform user property for SIGNUP_PAGE_VIEWED event. When triggered from B2B partners' link (Example: [https://app.voltmoney.in/partnerPlatform?platform=BHARATNXT](https://app.voltmoney.in/partnerPlatform?platform=BHARATNXT)) it should contain partner platform information. Sample values include: BHARATNXT, VOLT_MOBILE_APP, VOLT_WEB_APP, etc. This user property is currently populated by BE events only.
4. Referral code tracking in MFC_CHECK_LIMIT_LANDING_PAGE_VIEWED event.
